name: Prosciutto-Cantaloupe Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cantaloupe in half and discard the seeds.
2. Remove the rind and cut crosswise into slices about 1-inch wide.
3. Lay each slice flat and cut into long slices about 1-inch wide.
4. Trim off the curved ends to create cantaloupe sticks (about 3 inches long).
5. In a bowl, mix the almonds and nutmeg with the softened cream cheese until combined.
6. Spread approximately 1 teaspoon of the cream cheese mixture on one side of each cantaloupe stick.
7. Wrap a slice of prosciutto around each melon stick and secure it with a cellophane-tipped toothpick.
8. Refrigerate until serving time.
Special Hints:
- Cut any leftover cantaloupe sticks into cubes and skewer them with a cellophane-tipped toothpick for a refreshing snack.
- Toss the sticks into a fruit salad.
